headline_judgment.main_bottleneck: P3 compatibility geometry / higher-order feasible manifold

Q1_encoding_object_layer.current_answer: object kernel, concept kernel, family structure, bridge-role coordinates
Q1_encoding_object_layer.brain_guess: cortex stores object-like latent states rather than raw features

Q2_local_update_law.current_answer: local plastic update + conditional gating + multi-timescale retention
Q2_local_update_law.brain_guess: plasticity is local, gated, and regime-dependent rather than globally uniform

Q3_object_carrier_and_write_read_separat.function: Define how new evidence is written without destroying old identity.
Q3_object_carrier_and_write_read_separat.current_answer: write state / read state / persistence state separation
Q3_object_carrier_and_write_read_separat.brain_guess: brain likely uses fast-write, slow-read, slower-persistence strata

Q4_bridge_law_and_role_kernel.function: Lift object codes into relation and role structure.
Q4_bridge_law_and_role_kernel.current_answer: bridge selection law + stable role kernel
Q4_bridge_law_and_role_kernel.brain_guess: association areas reuse common bridge operators with region-specific parameterization

Q5_crossmodal_consistency.current_answer: shared object manifold is strongly supported
Q5_crossmodal_consistency.brain_guess: different modalities project to a shared object manifold with modality offsets

Q6_discriminative_geometry.function: Read shared object codes into stable decisions.
Q6_discriminative_geometry.current_answer: still not fully closed; shared manifold to discriminative geometry remains the hard boundary
Q6_discriminative_geometry.brain_guess: decision geometry is downstream of object geometry, not identical to it

Q7_brain_side_truth_and_3d_mapping.function: Map the abstract mechanism to real brain regions, cells, topology, and falsification.
Q7_brain_side_truth_and_3d_mapping.brain_guess: same mechanism family may recur across regions with different anatomical parameterization

formation_process_hypothesis.stage_1: Multimodal inputs are compressed into an object manifold with family and role offsets.
formation_process_hypothesis.stage_2: Local gated plasticity writes fast traces while protected memory preserves old geometry.
formation_process_hypothesis.stage_3: Bridge and role operators organize object states into relational structure.
formation_process_hypothesis.stage_4: A discriminative readout geometry is constructed from, but is not identical to, the object manifold.
formation_process_hypothesis.stage_5: Brain-side regions instantiate the same mechanism family under different topology and parameter regimes.

P3.name: compatibility_geometry
P3.goal: close shared object manifold -> discriminative geometry compatibility
P3.next_block: P3A transport/phase geometry formalism and execution block

verdict.core_answer: The seven questions increasingly reconstruct one controlled encoding dynamical system, but the missing closure is still the higher-order feasible manifold that links shared object geometry to discriminative geometry.
verdict.next_theory_target: formalize higher-order feasible manifold / meta-geometric admissibility
